sections.middle: NO. 393 Penguin Pokémon HT: 1'04" WT: 11.5 lbs. Water Splash 10+ Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage. weakness resistance A poor walker, it often falls down.
sections.bottom: However, its strong pride makes it puff up its chest without a care. retreat ©2013 Pokémon Illus. Mizue 33/113
